scope: Local test matrix for fee-aware SignalGuard write/read flows.
boundaries: Does not claim to calculate real mainnet or testnet gas.
Separates Studio prototype behavior from live-network fee behavior.
Uses deterministic fixtures so reviewers can inspect the assumptions.

cases.expected_fee_behavior: Read-only view calls should not require a write transaction.
cases.studio_note: Studio can execute the getter for inspection without a wallet fee flow.
cases.live_network_note: DApp reads should use readContract or equivalent free view flow.
cases.risk: Accidentally treating a read as a write creates avoidable wallet prompts.

cases.operation: Call review_claim with a claim and source URL.
cases.expected_fee_behavior: State-changing writes require signing, transaction processing, and sufficient balance for fees.
cases.studio_note: Studio transactions do not consume gas, so this is only a functional prototype check.
cases.live_network_note: Live clients should estimate or bound fees before asking the user to sign.
cases.risk: A Studio-only test can hide fee, balance, or finalization behavior.

cases.operation: Submit a very long source URL.
cases.expected_fee_behavior: Input length should be bounded before the write transaction is attempted.
cases.studio_note: Use local validation to reject malformed or oversized input before Studio execution.
cases.live_network_note: Rejecting bad input client-side reduces failed transactions and fee waste.
cases.risk: Bad inputs can waste user time and fees even when the contract rejects them.

cases.operation: Submit multiple review_claim calls in sequence.
cases.expected_fee_behavior: Each state-changing call should be treated as a separate fee-bearing transaction.
cases.studio_note: Studio can demonstrate state replacement but not real fee accumulation.
cases.live_network_note: Batching or user confirmation copy should make repeated write costs explicit.
cases.risk: Users may assume a repeated prototype interaction is free on live networks.
